full_description: use the specified hand to move the block from one colored area to the other colored area
schema: {A} denotes the block. {B} denotes the specified hand. {C} denotes the target area.
preference: Mention moving the block from one colored area to the other with the specified hand.
seen: Pick up {A} with {B} and place it on the other colored area.
Move {A} from its current colored area to the other one using {B}.
